metadata.methodology: Ninja Nerd URLs verified by direct observation of ninjanerd.org lecture index pages. Dirty Medicine (299), Armando Hasudungan (~440), and Randy Neil MD (~80 topical, ~190 total) titles/durations verified from complete channel listings provided by user. For all three, students locate videos by searching the exact title on the respective channel.

corrections_to_stepadapt_context.correction: Randy Neil MD's flagship specialty is BIOSTATISTICS (his Biostatistics SUMMARY video has 2M views). However, he DOES have significant biochemistry content (his 11-video 'biochem story' series + Must Know Pathways series), which likely explains the original label. Best framing: Randy Neil covers BIOSTATS (primary), GENETICS, ETHICS, COMMUNICATION, PHARMACOLOGY foundations, HUMAN DEVELOPMENT, BIOCHEM narrative pathways, and select topics in GASTRO/NEURO/PSYCH. Broad but biostats is the flagship.
Broader scope: NBME Top Concepts, Pathoma Ch. 1-3 integration, biostats, ethics, organ system integration. Free + paid at hyguru.com.

dirty_medicine.name: Dirty Medicine
dirty_medicine.strength: quick mnemonics, high-yield recall, ethics, biostats
dirty_medicine.best_for: application gaps, drug side effects, storage diseases, biostats, ethics, MSK, psych

armando_hasudungan.name: Armando Hasudungan
armando_hasudungan.strength: hand-drawn visual pathology, neuroanatomy, embryology, immunology, rheumatology, DMARDs/immunosuppressants

randy_neil_md.name: Randy Neil MD
randy_neil_md.strength: biostatistics (flagship - 2M view Basics video), genetics, ethics, communication, pharmacology foundations, human development, biochemistry narrative pathways

pathoma.name: Pathoma
pathoma.stepadapt_policy: StepAdapt recommends ONLY Chapters 1-3 (Cell Injury, Inflammation, Neoplasia). Ch. 4+ replaced by free YouTube.

sketchy.name: Sketchy
sketchy.strength: visual mnemonics for pharm and micro
sketchy.stepadapt_policy: Only for Pharmacology and Microbiology. If student has Sketchy, recommend over YouTube. If not, use Dirty Medicine.

ninja_nerd_gaps_filled_by_dirty_medicine: Psych (mood, psychotic, anxiety, personality, substance use)
remaining_gaps_requiring_armando_or_path: Pathology foundation (cell injury, inflammation, neoplasia) → Pathoma Ch. 1-3 remains essential
Sketchy visual mnemonics → optional; Dirty Medicine's micro series is a free substitute

students_without_sketchy.recommendation: Use Dirty Medicine microbiology series - 20+ individual organism videos cover the high-yield bacteria comprehensively. Combined with Ninja Nerd's antibiotics lecture, this provides full pharm+micro coverage.

gaps_and_guidance.note: With Ninja Nerd + Dirty Medicine + Armando Hasudungan + Randy Neil MD integrated, every high-yield Step 1 topic has at least 2-3 quality free resources. Pathoma Ch. 1-3 is the only paid resource that remains essential.
